summary: Both fix commits are correct and additive. All three code-reviewer round-1 findings (T10-R1-M1/M2/M3) are resolved in commit 13f25d4. The test-reviewer fixes in commit cee0c18 (F1/F2/F3/F5) are each sound and improve test correctness and isolation. No new issues found.

round1_resolution.T10-R1-M2: FIXED (13f25d4) — Fastify happy path lines 703-713 now decode X-PAYMENT-RESPONSE and assert all four fields (success, network, transaction regex, payer). Identical coverage to node-http path.
round1_resolution.T10-R1-M1: FIXED (13f25d4) — developerBEoa extraction and void suppression both removed. Destructuring now reads only { usdcAddress, nodeServerBOrigin } from state.
round1_resolution.T10-R1-M3: ADDRESSED (13f25d4) — inline comment added to arc-testnet afterAll explaining viem http transport's one-shot fetch model.

test_reviewer_fixes_assessment.F1_paused_sleep_8000: SOUND — 8 s gives a 3 s margin over the 5 s cache TTL. Within testTimeout: 60_000. Reduces flakiness on cold CI runners without significant time cost.
test_reviewer_fixes_assessment.F2_vault_not_deployed_computed_address: SOUND and a genuine correctness improvement. The original test signed with to=0x0, which could have been caught earlier by a to_mismatch check if verify ran before vault_not_deployed. Using factory.computeVaultAddress(devB) ensures the test reaches vault_not_deployed on its own merits regardless of pipeline ordering. The single readContract in beforeAll is negligible overhead.
test_reviewer_fixes_assessment.F3_isolate_true: SOUND — explicitly setting isolate: true makes the module-registry isolation guarantee load-bearing rather than implicit. Vitest's default is already isolate: true in most configurations so this is belt-and-braces, but the accompanying comment explaining the NETWORKS mutation motivation is valuable.
test_reviewer_fixes_assessment.F5_ajv_validate_node_http_402: SOUND — ajv-validating the 402 body in the node-http happy path brings forked-e2e to parity with arc-testnet-e2e. Validator compiled once in beforeAll (module-scope validate402) and reused correctly. The undefined guard before use and eslint-disable for console.error follow the same pattern as arc-testnet-e2e.

recommended_action: Approved. No further review rounds required.
